zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Coleclough於1462年出生在英國史洛普爾時，她的父親Joseph Coleclough42歲，母親Margery de Greene22歲。她於1488年與Rev John Barker在英國英格蘭史洛普爾馬可特 德雷頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1538年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾享年76歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾可拉維利。

nameMeanings.name: Coleclough
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Colclough
meanings: English (Staffordshire and Cheshire): habitational name from Cowclough in the parish of Whitworth, Lancashire, earlier recorded as Colleclogh, probably named with the Old English byname Cola (see Cole 2) + Old English clōh ‘ravine’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Coleclough was born in 1462, in Shropshire, England, her father, Joseph Coleclough, was 42 and her mother, Margery de Greene, was 22. She married Rev John Barker in 1488, in Market Drayton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1538, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76, and was buried in Claverley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Coleclough est née en 1462, à Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Joseph Coleclough, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Margery de Greene, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Rev John Barker en 1488, à Market Drayton, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1538, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Claverley, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Coleclough 1462 in Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Joseph Coleclough 42 und ihre Mutter Margery de Greene 22. Sie hat 1488 in Market Drayton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Rev John Barker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1538 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Claverley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Colecloughが1462年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Joseph Colecloughは42歳，母Margery de Greeneは22歳であった。1488年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアマーケト ドレイトンでRev John Barkerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1538年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで76歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアクラバーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Coleclough(이)가 1462년 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Joseph Coleclough(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery de Greene(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1488년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 마크트 드라이턴에서 Rev John Barker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1538년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 클레이벌리에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Coleclough родилась в 1462 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Joseph Coleclough было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Margery de Greene, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rev John Barker в 1488 г. в местности маркет дреитон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1538 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности клавирли, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Coleclough nació en 1462, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Joseph Coleclough, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Margery de Greene, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Rev John Barker en 1488, en Market Drayton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1538, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultada en Claverley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
